case_title: JAWED KARIM INVESTMENTS, LLC VS. EMMANUEL BAMFO ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-30-2020 CONTINUED TO MAR-03-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN DEFAULT JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNCONTESTED CALENDAR OF JAN-26-2021 NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT - CONTINUED TO MAR-11-2021 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 514 IN ORDER FOR PLAINTIFF TO PROVIDE THE COURT WITH ADDITIONAL INFORMATION IN SUPPORT OF ITS REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF COURT JUDGMENT. KEVIN A. CALIA, ESQ. APPEARED FOR PLAINTIFF JAWED KARIM INVESTMENTS, LLC. JAWID KARIM, PRESIDENT OF JAWED KARIM INVESTMENTS, LLC, WAS PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. BOTH MESSRS. CALIA & KARIM APPEARED VIA ZOOM FOR THIS MORNING'S HEARING. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT GLOBE LAB, INC. PLAINTIFF TO PROVIDE DEFENDANT(S) WITH NOTICE OF THE CONTINUED HEARING DATE. calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-08-2021 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Default Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-11-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Globe Labs, Inc.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Kevin A. Calia, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Jawed Karim Investments, LLC.
Jawed Karim, President of Jawed Karim Investments, LLC, was placed under oath and testified.
Messrs. Calia and Karim appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Globe Labs, Inc.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Fraudulent Misrepresentation, Negligent Misrepresentation and Breach of the Covenant of Good Faith and Fair Dealing was filed on July 27, 2020, and personally served on defendant Globe Lab, Inc.'s Agent of Process on August 16, 2020.
Default as to defendant Globe Lab, inc. was entered on September 25, 2020.
Dismissal as to defendant Emmanuel Bamfo was filed with the Clerk's Office on October 30, 2020.
Plaintiff's Complaint did not name any DOE defendants.

Plaintiff Jawed Karim Investments, LLC submits the following exhibits for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Simple Agreement for Future Equity ("SAFE") between the parties............ID/EVID
Exhibit 2: Globe Labs, Inc.'s SAFE Summary and Wire Instructions......................ID/EVID
Exhibit 3: Confirmation of Wire Transfer..............................................ID/EVID
Exhibit 4: Plaintiff's Citi Priority Services Statements..............................ID/EVID
Exhibit 5: First Legal Network Invoices...............................................ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Jawed Karim Investments, LLC, and against the defaulted defendant Globe Labs, Inc., as follows:

Damages/Principal - $150,000.00.
Costs - $850.00.

Total - $150,850.00.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Plaintiff STIPULATES to the return of the exhibits.
